scripts.web: pnpm run build:web && deno run -A web/server.ts
scripts.dev:cleanup: sh -c 'for port in ${WOOZI_WEB_PORT:-4317} ${WOOZI_API_PORT:-8788}; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; sleep 1; fi; done'
scripts.dev:cleanup:web: sh -c 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:${WOOZI_WEB_PORT:-4317} -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; sleep 1; fi'
scripts.dev:local: pnpm run dev:cleanup && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --profile local-s3 up -d minio minio-setup quickwit
scripts.dev:hmr: pnpm run dev:docker-api && pnpm run dev:cleanup:web && WOOZI_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8787 pnpm run dev:web
scripts.dev:docker-api: docker compose --profile local-s3 up -d --build minio minio-setup quickwit openbesluitvorming
scripts.dev:hmr:docker: pnpm run dev:docker-api && WOOZI_API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8787 pnpm run dev:web
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src tests web/src web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
scripts.check-format: oxfmt --check src tests web/src web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
